title: Airbnb gateway send ledger entry
description: Append-only record of one send attempt. Keyed by dedupe_key. Written at the 'attempted' transition, before verification, so a crash mid-verify never looks like 'never sent'. The presence of an entry for a dedupe_key blocks any further send for that key.

thread_id.description: Airbnb message thread id the reply was sent to.

attempted_at.description: When the send endpoint was called exactly once.

final_state.description: State after the verify loop. 'pending' only transiently between send and verify.

verified_at.description: When the outbound message was verified visible. Null unless final_state=confirmed.

operator.description: Agent or human id that performed the send.
